properties.name: modal
properties.description: sets the side drawer's type to modal

properties.name: open
properties.description: indicates whether the side drawer is open

properties.name: trailing
properties.description: sets the side of the side drawer

events.name: open
events.description: Fired when the side drawer is opened.

events.name: close
events.description: Fired when the side drawer is closed.

events.name: cancel
events.description: Fired when the user requests to close the side-drawer. You can prevent the side drawer from closing by calling `.preventDefault()` on the event.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Sets assigned nodes to the side drawer itself.

slots.name: app-content
slots.description: Sets assigned nodes to the main application content, the side drawer is opened next to.
